texto: Losing your parent at a tender age is like losing everything thing. The love, care, support and what have you. It only takes determination, strong will and the love, care and support from others to make a difference in the lives of these ones as they grow to face their future. You and I can impact in their lives...Just a little love, a little care, a little support can make a huge difference in a child's life. Support an orphan today!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Oziohu Sanni: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Losing your parent at a tender age is like losing everything thing. The love, care, support and w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, humour, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e termino.
